$bridge_enable_desc.en: Enable or disable this bridge. Disabled bridges stop and purge their queue directory.
$bridge_enable_desc.zh: 启用或禁用此桥接。禁用的桥接会停止运行并清除其队列目录。

$bridge_remote_desc.en: Name of the remote broker definition under 'remotes' that this bridge connects to.
$bridge_remote_desc.zh: 此桥接连接的远程 Broker 定义名称（在 'remotes' 中配置）。

$bridge_proto_ver_desc.en: MQTT protocol version used to connect to the remote broker: v3 (MQTT 3.1), v4 (MQTT 3.1.1), or v5 (MQTT 5.0).
$bridge_proto_ver_desc.zh: 连接远程 Broker 时使用的 MQTT 协议版本：v3（MQTT 3.1）、v4（MQTT 3.1.1）或 v5（MQTT 5.0）。

$bridge_clientid_prefix_desc.en: Prefix for auto-generated MQTT client IDs. Each connection appends a unique index (e.g. 'emqx-dq-mybridge-0'). Leave empty to use the default 'emqx-dq-<bridge>-' prefix.
$bridge_clientid_prefix_desc.zh: 自动生成的 MQTT 客户端 ID 前缀。每个连接会追加一个唯一索引（例如 'emqx-dq-mybridge-0'）。留空使用默认前缀 'emqx-dq-<bridge>-'。

$bridge_keepalive_s_desc.en: MQTT keep-alive interval in seconds for the connection to the remote broker.
$bridge_keepalive_s_desc.zh: 连接远程 Broker 时使用的 MQTT 保活间隔（单位：秒）。

$bridge_filter_topic_desc.en: Local topic filter pattern. Messages published locally to topics matching this filter are forwarded to the remote broker. Supports '+' and '#' wildcards.
$bridge_filter_topic_desc.zh: 本地主题过滤器模式。本地发布到匹配该过滤器的主题的消息将被转发到远程 Broker。支持 '+' 和 '#' 通配符。

$bridge_remote_topic_desc.en: Target topic template used when publishing to the remote broker. Use '${topic}' to reference the original publish topic (e.g. 'fwd/${topic}').
$bridge_remote_topic_desc.zh: 向远程 Broker 发布消息时使用的目标主题模板。可用 '${topic}' 引用原始发布主题（例如 'fwd/${topic}'）。

$bridge_remote_qos_desc.en: QoS level for publishing to the remote broker. The default '${qos}' preserves the original message's QoS. Set to '0', '1', or '2' to force a specific QoS.
$bridge_remote_qos_desc.zh: 向远程 Broker 发布消息使用的 QoS 等级。默认 '${qos}' 保留原始消息的 QoS。可设置为 '0'、'1' 或 '2' 强制使用指定的 QoS。

$bridge_remote_retain_desc.en: Retain flag for publishing to the remote broker. The default '${retain}' preserves the original message's retain flag. Set to 'true' to always retain or 'false' to never retain.
$bridge_remote_retain_desc.zh: 向远程 Broker 发布消息时使用的 Retain 标志。默认 '${retain}' 保留原始消息的 Retain 标志。设置为 'true' 始终保留，'false' 从不保留。

$bridge_pool_size_desc.en: Number of MQTT connections to the remote broker per bridge.
$bridge_pool_size_desc.zh: 每个桥接到远程 Broker 的 MQTT 连接数。

$bridge_buffer_pool_size_desc.en: Number of disk-queue buffer workers (partitions) per bridge. Should be greater than or equal to, and a multiple of, 'Connection Pool Size'. Changing this value reshards the queue and may temporarily break per-topic ordering.
$bridge_buffer_pool_size_desc.zh: 每个桥接的磁盘队列缓冲区工作进程数（即分区数）。该值应大于或等于「连接池大小」，并且为其整数倍。修改此值会触发队列重分片，可能临时打破按主题的有序性。

$bridge_max_inflight_desc.en: Maximum number of unacknowledged messages allowed per remote connection. Also controls the batch pop size from the disk queue.
$bridge_max_inflight_desc.zh: 每个远程连接允许的最大未确认消息数。同时控制从磁盘队列中批量取出的消息数。

$bridge_enqueue_timeout_ms_desc.en: Maximum time (milliseconds) the local publish path will block waiting for disk-queue enqueue confirmation. Only applies to QoS > 0 publishes; QoS 0 publishes are always asynchronous. The message is not lost on timeout — it remains in the buffer worker's mailbox.
$bridge_enqueue_timeout_ms_desc.zh: 本地发布路径等待磁盘队列入队确认的最长时间（毫秒）。仅对 QoS > 0 的发布生效；QoS 0 的发布始终异步处理。超时不会丢失消息——消息仍保留在缓冲区工作进程的邮箱中。

$bridge_max_publish_retries_desc.en: Number of publish retry attempts per message before it is dropped. Set to '-1' for infinite retries. Each failed PUBACK or connection loss consumes one retry credit.
$bridge_max_publish_retries_desc.zh: 每条消息在被丢弃前的发布重试次数。设置为 '-1' 表示无限重试。每次 PUBACK 失败或连接断开会消耗一次重试机会。

$queue_base_dir_desc.en: Base directory for disk-queue segment files. Bridge name and partition index are appended automatically (i.e. <base_dir>/<bridge_name>/<index>). Relative paths resolve against EMQX 'data_dir'; absolute paths are used as-is. Leave empty to use the default 'emqx_bridge_mqtt_dq'.
$queue_base_dir_desc.zh: 磁盘队列分段文件的基础目录。桥接名称和分区索引会自动追加到路径上（即 <base_dir>/<bridge_name>/<index>）。相对路径相对于 EMQX 的 'data_dir' 解析；绝对路径按原样使用。留空则使用默认值 'emqx_bridge_mqtt_dq'。

$queue_seg_bytes_desc.en: Maximum size per disk-queue segment file (e.g. '100MB'). Larger segments reduce file rotation overhead.
$queue_seg_bytes_desc.zh: 磁盘队列每个分段文件的最大大小（例如 '100MB'）。较大的分段可以减少文件切换的开销。

$queue_max_total_bytes_desc.en: Maximum disk-queue size per partition (e.g. '1GB'). Each bridge has 'Buffer Pool Size' partitions, so worst-case total disk usage equals 'Buffer Pool Size' multiplied by this value. Oldest messages are dropped when the limit is exceeded.
$queue_max_total_bytes_desc.zh: 每个分区的磁盘队列最大大小（例如 '1GB'）。每个桥接拥有「缓冲区池大小」个分区，因此最坏情况下总磁盘占用为「缓冲区池大小」乘以该值。超过该限制时，最旧的消息会被丢弃。

$remote_server_desc.en: Remote MQTT broker address in 'host:port' format (e.g. 'broker.example.com:1883').
$remote_server_desc.zh: 远程 MQTT Broker 地址，格式为 'host:port'（例如 'broker.example.com:1883'）。

$remote_username_desc.en: Username for authentication with the remote broker. Leave empty if no authentication is required.
$remote_username_desc.zh: 用于向远程 Broker 进行身份认证的用户名。如不需要认证，可留空。

$remote_password_desc.en: Password for authentication with the remote broker. Leave empty if no authentication is required.
$remote_password_desc.zh: 用于向远程 Broker 进行身份认证的密码。如不需要认证，可留空。

$ssl_enable_desc.en: Enable SSL/TLS for the connection to the remote broker.
$ssl_enable_desc.zh: 为到远程 Broker 的连接启用 SSL/TLS。

$ssl_verify_desc.en: TLS certificate verification mode. Use 'verify_peer' to verify the remote broker's certificate against the configured CA, or 'verify_none' to skip verification.
$ssl_verify_desc.zh: TLS 证书验证模式。'verify_peer' 表示使用配置的 CA 校验远程 Broker 证书；'verify_none' 表示不进行校验。

$ssl_sni_desc.en: TLS Server Name Indication. Defaults to the server hostname. Set to 'disable' to turn off SNI.
$ssl_sni_desc.zh: TLS 服务器名称指示。默认为服务器主机名。设置为 'disable' 可关闭 SNI。

$ssl_cacertfile_desc.en: Path to the CA certificate file used to verify the remote broker's certificate.
$ssl_cacertfile_desc.zh: 用于校验远程 Broker 证书的 CA 证书文件路径。

$ssl_certfile_desc.en: Path to the client certificate file used for mutual TLS authentication.
$ssl_certfile_desc.zh: 用于双向 TLS 认证的客户端证书文件路径。

$ssl_keyfile_desc.en: Path to the client private key file used for mutual TLS authentication.
$ssl_keyfile_desc.zh: 用于双向 TLS 认证的客户端私钥文件路径。
